arbitrum_sepolia_aave_rpc.skip_reason: No Aave pool configured for this spoke

model_breakdown.shap_interpretation: SHAP values show each feature's push toward default (positive SHAP = higher default risk, lower CredScore). Values are on the model's log-odds scale.

feature_derivation.wallet_age_days: Days since earliest wallet_first_seen across wallet sources (Dune/RPC)
feature_derivation.tx_count: Sum of tx_count from Alchemy/RPC aggregate + Dune wallet rows
feature_derivation.protocol_diversity: Sum of unique_protocols from Dune/RPC wallet rows
feature_derivation.total_borrows: Sum of total_borrows from CredFlow hub + spoke Aave RPC + Dune mainnet Aave
feature_derivation.defi_liquidation_count: Sum of liquidation_count from borrow sources
feature_derivation.avg_loan_duration_days: Weighted average loan duration from borrow sources
feature_derivation.eth_balance: Sum of eth_balance_wei across active RPC chains / 1e18
feature_derivation.gmx_sub_score: GMX subgraph score (0-100) or neutral 50 when skipped/no history
feature_derivation.has_gmx_history: 1 if GMX subgraph returned positions/trades, else 0

wallet_sub_score.formula: 30 + age(min 20) + tx(min 15) + diversity(min 15) + repayment*15 - liquidations*20 + balance(min 10)

gmx_data.note: INDEX_MAINNET=0 — GMX only indexed on mainnet
